blockedAssertions.blockedBy: A full successful local confidence-stack run could not be validated because Playwright requires exclusive 3100/3101 ownership and those ports were already occupied by existing shared processes.
Repeated full-stack reruns on current local revision are blocked at Playwright startup by occupied mission ports, preventing validation of passing-stack repeatability in this session.

appliedUpdates.description: Documented shared-port occupancy quirk that blocks Playwright rerun repeatability checks when 3100/3101 are already in use in multi-worker sessions.
